name: aws-swe/caminov/incident-responder
description: Incident response agent that triages alerts, correlates logs, and suggests remediation steps. Integrates with the deploy-agent for automated rollback on critical incidents.

card_data.name: aws-swe/caminov/incident-responder
card_data.description: Incident response agent that triages alerts, correlates logs, and suggests remediation steps.

skills.name: Triage Alert
skills.description: Analyzes an incoming alert, correlates with recent deployments, and determines severity and recommended action.
examples: Triage this P1 alert for service X with 5xx spike

skills.name: Request Deployment Rollback
skills.description: Calls the deploy-agent to initiate a rollback when a critical incident is confirmed.
examples: Critical incident confirmed — request rollback of service X via deploy-agent
